agents.name: Explorer Agent
agents.role: Surfaces the relevant staging and intermediate models for the trade-promo question. Starts from the planning problem, not the file tree.
agents.sample_input: Find the models in this project related to promotional lift, SKU velocity, back-to-school promo, Mid-Atlantic region, and execution audit.
responsibilities: Runs status to confirm the dbt project is parsed and healthy
Runs search with trade-promo vocabulary against model names, columns, and descriptions
Hands the candidate model list to Summary

agents.name: Summary Agent
agents.role: Explains the grain of each upstream, the join keys, and where the gap is. Decides before any SQL whether the data can answer the question at all.
agents.sample_input: For those models, show the grain, key columns, and how they join. Where does the gap sit between what we have and what the VP Demand Planning asked for?
responsibilities: Runs describe on each candidate model to confirm grain
Runs lineage to validate the join path
Names the new grain the gold table has to land on

agents.name: Worker Agent
agents.role: Does file edits and model generation. Authors the new gold.fct_lift_by_sku_promo_region_week with the right CTE structure, joins, and final select.
agents.sample_input: Create gold.fct_lift_by_sku_promo_region_week as a table materialization. Validate the proposed grain with a deterministic dbt_show slice before committing the file.
responsibilities: Runs warehouse and dbt_show on a targeted slice to validate proposed grain
Writes the SQL file with header comments, CTEs, joins, and final aggregation
Materializes the model to the gold schema on Iceberg

agents.name: Verification Agent
agents.role: Adds dbt tests, schema contract, and ownership. Validates against existing lineage and confirms downstream consumers can read the new asset.
agents.sample_input: Add tests covering uniqueness on (sku_id, promo_id, region, week_start_date) and not-null on actual_lift_pct. Confirm lineage updates pick the new gold table up immediately.
responsibilities: Writes the YAML companion with description, tests, and schema contract
Confirms uniqueness and not-null tests pass against the materialized slice
Updates lineage so downstream consumers pick the asset up immediately
